description: Wikimediafoundation.org is the Wikimedia Foundation’s nonprofit organizational site, describing its mission, technology work, fundraising, and news. It supports and hosts Wikipedia and related Wikimedia projects, but the integration surfaces referenced there belong to other domains, not wikimediafoundation.org.
summary: No public developer integration surfaces were found on wikimediafoundation.org itself; the domain appears to be the Wikimedia Foundation’s organizational website rather than an API, GraphQL, MCP, or CLI endpoint host.
